case_title: COOPER BASCH IRENE VS EAGLE VAN LINES

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,950.00 FILED BY COOPER BASCH IRENE AS TO DEFENDANT EAGLE VAN LINES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-24-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF COOPER BASCH IRENE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EAGLE VAN LINES $1,425.00 PRINCIPAL, $13.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,438.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF COOPER BASCH IRENE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EAGLE VAN LINES $1,425.00 PRINCIPAL, $13.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,438.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF JUDGMENT TO EAGLE VAN LINES RETURNED, FORWARDING ORDER EXPIRED.
CERT.RETURN REC.FOR BAKER DANIEL.NOT SIGNED BY ADDRESSEE.
